message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Adding get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor method to ImageBlock class

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Adding normalize_image_bytes helper + refactoring image_to_base64 in types.py only

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Our features both touch types.py (mine: normalize_image_bytes helper + image_to_base64 refactor; yours: get_image_mimetype accessor). Files can't be fully disjoint here. Propose: I edit first (small, additive change to image_to_base64/model_validator area only), send DONE, then you edit after - that avoids concurrent-edit races on the same file. I will NOT touch any accessor method you add. OK with this order?

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: We both must touch types.py (only ImageBlock touches this file for either feature) so true file-disjointness isn't possible. Let's carve by lines instead: my change only touches the mimetype-guessing lines inside image_to_base64 (currently lines 78-80: 'if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(...); self.image_mimetype = guess.mime...') plus adding a new method get_image_mimetype() elsewhere in the class. I will NOT touch base64-encoding/image-byte lines (line 82 self.image = base64.b64encode(self.image)) or add/modify any normalize_image_bytes helper. Please confirm your normalize_image_bytes/refactor only touches the byte-encoding side (not the mimetype guessing lines) so our edits don't collide. If your refactor needs to touch the mimetype lines too, let's agree on final combined code for image_to_base64 before either of us edits.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed: you edit first (image_to_base64/normalize_image_bytes only, no accessor methods), send DONE when finished. I'll then checkpoint the tree and add get_image_mimetype() without touching your normalize_image_bytes logic. Will diff only my own changes for patch.txt. Go ahead.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: My task requires rewriting the ENTIRE body of image_to_base64 (mimetype-guess line included) since normalize_image_bytes returns decoded_for_guessing which replaces the guess input. So I can't cleanly avoid line 78-80. Proposal: I own the full image_to_base64 method + new normalize_image_bytes helper function (this is the whole scope of my task). You own a brand-new, separate method get_image_mimetype() added elsewhere in the ImageBlock class (e.g. after resolve_image), which does NOT require editing image_to_base64's existing body - it can just call filetype.guess independently when invoked lazily. Please confirm your get_image_mimetype() can be purely additive (new method, no edits inside image_to_base64) - if so we're disjoint by code region even though same file. If your design truly requires removing/altering the eager guess in image_to_base64, share the exact intended final code so we merge before editing.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Confirmed. I'll edit image_to_base64 + add normalize_image_bytes now, then send DONE. You proceed with get_image_mimetype() after my DONE.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Confirmed: get_image_mimetype() will be purely additive, added after resolve_image() in the ImageBlock class. It will independently call filetype.guess (using self.image/path/url via resolve_image or similar) and cache into self.image_mimetype. I will NOT touch image_to_base64's body, model_validator logic, or add/modify normalize_image_bytes. You own the full image_to_base64 method + normalize_image_bytes helper. Go ahead and send DONE when finished; I'll wait before editing.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Finished: added normalize_image_bytes() helper and refactored image_to_base64() to use it. Tests pass (12/12 in test_types.py). Verified both raw-bytes and pre-encoded-base64 inputs normalize correctly. You're clear to add get_image_mimetype() now - I did not add any accessor methods.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Added get_image_mimetype() as a purely additive method after resolve_image() (no edits to image_to_base64 or normalize_image_bytes). It returns cached image_mimetype if set, otherwise resolves image bytes via resolve_image(as_base64=False) and guesses/caches via filetype.guess. All 12 existing tests in test_types.py pass. Wrote patch.txt.
